pom.xml.general_idea: Update the project's target Java version from 17 to 21 to align with the JDK migration.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project is migrating to JDK 21; keeping the source/target at 17 prevents utilizing new language features and may cause compatibility issues with libraries requiring JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Kotlin version to 2.2.10 to support JDK 21 and access new language features.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Kotlin versions may not fully support or compile correctly against JDK 21 bytecode or APIs.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Vert.x to version 5.0.3 which requires JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Vert.x 5.x drops support for JDK 17 and requires JDK 21+ to run.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot to version 3.5.4 to ensure compatibility with JDK 21 and Vert.x 5.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires JDK 17+, but specific minor versions and ecosystem alignment (like Vert.x 5) often necessitate newer releases for stability on JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Hibernate to version 9.0.1.Final to align with Jakarta EE 10/11 standards required by JDK 21 ecosystem.
pom.xml.why_exists: Hibernate 6.x/7.x might still rely on older Jakarta versions or have compatibility issues with the newer JDK 21 runtime environment compared to 9.x.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Jakarta EL API dependency to replace or supplement the deprecated javax.el API.
pom.xml.why_exists: JDK 21 and modern frameworks (like Hibernate 9) use Jakarta EE namespaces (jakarta.el) instead of javax.el. Using javax.el may lead to runtime errors or missing class exceptions in a pure Jakarta environment.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Maven Compiler Plugin to 3.14.0 to ensure proper compilation support for JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older compiler plugins may not correctly handle JDK 21 specific bytecode features or module system changes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade JUnit 5 to version 5.13.4 to ensure test compatibility with JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older JUnit versions may have issues running on JDK 21 due to internal API changes or module restrictions.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Mockito to version 5.2.0 (via property rename) to support JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Mockito versions prior to 5.x had significant issues with JDK 16+ and 21+ due to reflection restrictions.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade GraalVM Script Engine to 24.2.2 to support JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: GraalVM components must match the JDK version they run on; older versions may fail to load or execute on JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Lombok to 1.18.38 to ensure proper annotation processing on JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Lombok versions prior to 1.18.30+ had known issues with JDK 16+ and 21+ due to internal API changes.
